This is significant as closing the loop on long-range agentic tasks remains one of the hardest open problems in applied AI.

This dual push into space-based and ground-based AI compute infrastructure underscores China's strategy to build sovereign, large-scale AI training capacity.

articles.title: 云迹科技发布“人机共生世界价值模型”
articles.summary: Yunji Technology unveiled its 'Human-Machine Symbiosis World Value Model' at WAIC 2026, trained on over 1.1 billion real service interactions and designed for multi-robot coordination and value-driven intelligent decision-making. This advances the field of service robotics by moving beyond rule-based control toward goal-optimized, context-aware AI planning architectures.

articles.title: 三次冲击，对应三种不同的价格信号
articles.summary: An analysis argues that China's AI commercialization narrative has fundamentally shifted across three successive competitive waves, each marked by distinct pricing signals in the market. This matters as it suggests Chinese AI firms are moving past the subsidized growth phase toward sustainable monetization models, reshaping the competitive landscape.

articles.title: 腾讯云吴运声：企业级智能体需求翻倍增长 落地难在打通企业数据与流程

This highlights the last-mile enterprise adoption challenge that will define the next competitive battleground for AI platform vendors.

articles.title: 现场直击世界人工智能大会 AI具象落地提速

This reflects a pivotal industry inflection point where proof-of-concept AI is being replaced by production-grade implementations at scale.

articles.title: 利好来了！算电协同领域迎来大消息

articles.title: 算力产业迎重磅消息！中国电信最新宣布
articles.summary: China Telecom made a significant announcement regarding its computing power industry strategy, likely involving expanded AI infrastructure commitments. articles.title: 首款智能体手机面世：VC视角下的三个关键问题

This development signals a potential new hardware category where AI agents are first-class OS-level citizens rather than app-layer additions.

articles.title: 中科闻歌发布首个AI决策“全家桶”，企业决策卷入“10分钟时代”

This reflects intensifying competition to bring AI-driven enterprise decision intelligence to market, promising to compress complex decision cycles to under 10 minutes.

articles.title: 天谱乐大模型发布4.7，让AI音乐更懂“二次创作”｜独家

articles.title: 在WAIC，第一次觉得AI不必那么聪明

This sentiment signals a broader industry and public maturation from hype-driven expectations toward practical, trust-based AI adoption.

articles.title: TRAE Work上线 40 万字的“AI 打工说明书”！一手实测在此
articles.summary: ByteDance's TRAE Work platform published a 400,000-character AI work instruction guide aimed at lowering the barrier for ordinary users to effectively employ AI in professional tasks. This represents a content-driven approach to AI adoption, addressing the usability gap that limits mainstream productivity tool penetration.

articles.title: 这家物理AI赛道的新兵，正探索“可信”交付

articles.title: 妙啊！无人机直连卫星传Token

articles.title: Kimi K3：马斯克 Impressed

articles.title: 算力定价权的转移——从"你有多少张卡"到"Token成本多少"
articles.summary: Analysis from WAIC 2026 notes a pivotal shift in how customers evaluate AI compute: questions have moved from 'how many GPUs do you have?' to 'what is your token cost and latency?', reflecting a structural transition from training-era capacity competition to inference-era cost efficiency. This signals that the AI industry's value chain is reorienting around per-token economics rather than raw chip counts.

articles.title: 实测Kimi K3：强得意外，慢得着急
articles.summary: A hands-on review of Moonshot AI's new Kimi K3 model finds surprisingly strong capability ceilings but notes that response speed remains a significant bottleneck for user experience. This suggests Kimi K3 is competitive at the frontier but faces engineering challenges in productionizing inference performance.

articles.title: 复旦大学联合天空智算首发天地一体化算力智能体SatAgent

The development signals the expansion of AI agent deployment into satellite and aerospace domains, with implications for both civilian and strategic applications.

articles.title: WAIC，我们看到这六个趋势

articles.title: 2026 WAIC，具身首次走上神坛

This signals growing Chinese industry confidence in near-AGI capabilities and the convergence of embodied AI with next-generation hardware.

articles.title: Agent越来越能干了，但为什么企业还是不敢用？

The convergence of generative AI, multimodal agents, and embodied intelligence at the conference signals that China's AI industry is entering a new cycle of rapid commercialization.

articles.title: 得物App联合千觉机器人发布AI鉴别机器人，亮相WAIC 20262026世界人工智能大会上，得物App携千觉机器人推出全球首款AI鉴别机器人，探索具身智能商品鉴别。依托“先鉴别、后发货”模式积累的数十亿级查验数据，得物自研“AI大脑”鉴别系统，通过细粒度感知实现精准鉴定。刚刚7.9K

This application demonstrates how embodied intelligence is moving into commercial quality-control workflows, blurring the line between e-commerce platforms and physical robotics.

articles.title: 重庆上线“渝小健”AI就医智能体，覆盖233家公立医院7月17日，重庆市卫生健康委员会上线便捷就医智能体“渝小健”，面向全市居民提供AI辅助就医服务。市民可通过支付宝或阿福App搜索使用，功能包括智能导诊、云陪诊、检查报告查询与AI解读。由市卫健委联合市大数据局、蚂蚁集团打造，依托数字重庆基础设施、医疗机构数据与蚂蚁AI大模型技术。刚刚8.5K
articles.summary: Chongqing's health authority launched 'Yuxiaojian,' an AI healthcare agent covering 233 public hospitals, offering residents intelligent triage, appointment guidance, and AI-interpreted medical reports via Alipay, built in collaboration with Ant Group's large language model technology. The deployment represents one of China's most expansive government-led AI health service rollouts, integrating public medical data with commercial AI infrastructure at a city scale.

articles.title: 银河通用机器人创始人王鹤： 2028 年，具身智能的 “ChatGPT 时刻” 即将来临！银河通用机器人CTO王鹤在2026世界人工智能大会上预测，具身智能2028年前将迎来重大突破，表现媲美ChatGPT。基础模型经海量数据训练，对未专门训练任务可达70%-80%成功率，堪比早期数字模型。刚刚9.2K
articles.summary: Wang He, CTO of Galaxy General Robotics, predicted at WAIC 2026 that embodied intelligence will reach a 'ChatGPT moment' by 2028, with foundation models already achieving 70–80% success rates on untrained tasks. This forecast highlights growing industry confidence that general-purpose robotics is approaching an inflection point comparable to the generative AI breakthrough of 2022.

articles.title: 腾讯智能体集中亮相世界人工智能大会
articles.summary: Tencent showcased a suite of AI agents at WAIC 2026 under the theme 'Hey, My AI Buddy,' highlighting its AI products as productivity and lifestyle companions across multiple domains. The display underscores Tencent's strategy to embed AI agents deeply into consumer and enterprise life, competing for platform dominance in the agent era.

articles.title: 神玑公司首次参加世界人工智能大会，发布睿动具身智能开发平台
articles.summary: NIO's chip subsidiary Shenyi Technology made its independent debut at WAIC 2026, launching the 'Ruidong' embodied intelligence development platform and a distributed agent platform alongside its NX9031 chip lineup covering autonomous driving, embodied AI, and agent inference. The move signals NIO's ambition to expand from automotive chips into broader AI hardware and platform ecosystems, intensifying competition in China's AI chip market.

articles.title: 从“功能漂移”到“成本倒逼”：《拟人化互动办法》生效前的行业急转弯
articles.summary: Ahead of China's forthcoming 'Anthropomorphic Interaction Regulations' taking effect, the article examines how companies are scrambling to adjust AI product features—shifting away from emotionally engaging but ambiguous 'function drift' designs due to both regulatory pressure and cost constraints. This regulatory-driven pivot illustrates how China's emerging AI governance rules are already reshaping product strategy before formal enforcement begins.

articles.title: 战魔田默｜从人工智能“时代之问”，到29国签署协定：全球AI治理要防的不只是机器失控
articles.summary: The article examines the global AI governance agreement signed by 29 nations, arguing that the central risk to be managed extends beyond runaway AI systems to include geopolitical misuse and power asymmetries among states. The multilateral accord represents a significant step in institutionalizing AI safety norms internationally, though its enforcement mechanisms and scope remain contested.

articles.title: The Labor of Machines: Why Capital is Valuing Unproven Robotics Companies at Billions
articles.summary: The article analyzes how venture capital is assigning multi-billion yuan valuations to early-stage robotics companies by treating physical interaction data—collected by robots performing manual tasks—as the foundational asset, effectively financializing human labor. This dynamic suggests that robotics investment is less about near-term hardware revenue and more about capturing proprietary data pipelines that could underpin future automation at scale.

articles.title: 超低延迟 AI 对话神器！Wan-Streamer v0.2 让你与 AI 零距离沟通通义实验室推出Wan-Streamer v0.2，彻底解决传统视频通话卡顿、延迟和声画不同步问题。该端到端全模态模型仅550毫秒响应，将听、看、说、演能力整合于单一Transformer架构，实现近乎真实的“面对面”自然交流。刚刚6.5K
articles.summary: Tongyi Lab released Wan-Streamer v0.2, an end-to-end multimodal streaming model that achieves 550ms response latency, integrating listening, vision, speech, and expression within a single Transformer architecture for near-real-time conversational video interaction. The ultra-low latency capability could reshape human-AI interaction standards for voice and video agents, raising the bar for real-time multimodal AI.

articles.title: 对话森博科技董事长于林义：AI应用拼的不只是技术，更是实证有效的业务闭环
articles.summary: Senbo Technology chairman Yu Linyi, interviewed at WAIC 2026, argued that enterprise AI competition is ultimately won not by raw technical capability but by building validated business process loops with measurable outcomes. This perspective reflects a broader maturation in China's enterprise AI market, where proof-of-value and domain-specific know-how are becoming key differentiators over model performance.

articles.title: Agent会干活了，却不会过日子
articles.summary: The article explores why AI agents, while increasingly capable of completing discrete tasks, struggle with the continuous, contextual coordination required for sustained household or daily life management, and how this gap is re-elevating the strategic value of hardware. This analysis highlights a key bottleneck in the agent era: moving from single-turn task completion to persistent, embodied real-world collaboration.

articles.title: AI for Science
articles.summary: This article covers the topic of AI for Science, likely discussing advances in applying artificial intelligence to scientific research domains. AI for Science represents a growing frontier where foundation models accelerate discovery in fields like biology, chemistry, and physics.

articles.title: 上海人工智能实验室
articles.summary: This article covers Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory (上海人工智能实验室), one of China's leading state-backed AI research institutions. The lab plays a central role in China's national AI strategy, developing foundational models and setting research directions for the country.

articles.title: 手机Agent的“上帝权限”困境：四层安全内核如何重构移动操作系统
articles.summary: The article examines the security risks posed by mobile AI agents that require extensive system permissions—dubbed 'god-level access'—and proposes a four-layer security kernel architecture to restructure mobile operating systems for safe agent deployment. As AI agents gain the ability to autonomously operate smartphones, the piece highlights an emerging and underaddressed attack surface that could compromise user privacy and device integrity at scale.

articles.title: 独家 | 智谱 ARR 达到10 亿美元，半年增长 15 倍
articles.summary: Zhipu AI's ARR reportedly reached $1 billion as of July 2026, growing 15x in six months, driven by AI coding and video generation, according to multiple independent sources the company has not confirmed. This suggests Chinese LLM startups can replicate the commercial success seen at Anthropic with Claude Code, challenging market skepticism about domestic AI monetization.

articles.title: 首token延迟砍掉3. 25 倍：小红书联手北大、上交提出HYPIC，给混合注意力大模型装上"位置无关缓存"大模型服务主战场正转向检索增强问答、多文档摘要和长程Agent。请求prompt由几十到上百个语义独立的片段（检索文档、技能说明、记忆、历史轮次）拼接，形成数万至数十万token的超长上下文，预填充阶段占据主导算力开销，成为服务商最突出的成本来源，且引发更棘手的难题。刚刚10.0K

Zhongke Jiahe, originating from the Chinese Academy of Sciences, specializes in compiler technology for domestic chips including Loongson and Huawei Ascend, filling a key gap in Zhipu's model infrastructure stack.

articles.title: 京东推出京麦AI经营中心，开放22款AI工具助力商家智能经营京东正式推出京麦AI经营中心，以AI驱动，打造集AI工具、专家服务和智能托管于一体的商家经营体系，全面开放22款核心AI工具，推动电商全链路智能化升级。该中心并非单点工具堆砌，而是基于多Agent协作、A2A智能对接和自然语言交互等技术构建的综合AI经营平台，旨在助力商家经营。刚刚10.4K
articles.summary: JD.com launched the Jingmai AI Operations Center, opening 22 AI tools to merchants built on multi-agent collaboration, A2A intelligent integration, and natural language interaction technologies. The platform represents a comprehensive AI-driven e-commerce operations system aimed at intelligentizing the full merchant workflow.

articles.summary: Embodied AI world model company Richeng Kaiwu (Beijing Richeng Robotics) raised hundreds of millions of yuan across two consecutive seed rounds within three months, backed by investors including Baidu Ventures, to develop its physical world foundation model LaMPA. The startup, founded by former NIO and Huawei autonomous driving engineers, aims to build cross-scenario generalizable robot control through world models and reinforcement learning.

articles.title: 中国AI真的超过美国了吗？两张图背后，真正值得关注的五个问题
articles.summary: A Huxiu analysis examines whether China's AI has truly surpassed the US, using two key charts to highlight five critical questions about the comparison. The piece matters as assessments of the US-China AI gap directly influence investment, policy, and strategic decisions on both sides.

articles.title: Soul亮相WAIC2026，发布SoulX多模态交互大模型与AI硬件B SoulSoul在WAIC2026上发布AI硬件B Soul，展示实时多模态交互与情绪感知应用。CTO陶明表示，公司已从社交App进化为聚焦情绪感知、交互技术和AI模型融合的生态型公司，坚持自研交互大模型路线，区别于通用大模型。刚刚8.3K

Unlike chatbots, the platform targets digital labor automation, positioning itself in the growing enterprise AI agent market.

articles.title: 多家银行上线AI主题银行卡，刷卡可获大模型Token和AI权益多家银行近期密集推出AI主题信用卡与借记卡，将大模型Token、AI会员等智能权益融入卡产品，吸引年轻和科技客群。7月15日银联宣布联合多家银行打造智能体主题信用卡，纵深推进AI权益与金融消费场景融合。6月以来招商、农行、平安、浦发等十余家银行已携手银联、美国运通及Kimi等平台率先尝试。刚刚8.8K

Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
articles.summary: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, has released its first model—Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open-source multimodal system trained on video and audio. The release positions the startup as a serious competitor to established labs like Anthropic and OpenAI in the foundation model space.

articles.title: Anthropic Plans IPO Investor Meetings as Mega-Listing Nears
articles.summary: Anthropic is preparing for a potential mega-IPO by arranging pre-listing meetings with investors, joining a wave of AI companies pursuing public market debuts. The listing would be a major milestone for the AI industry and could set valuation benchmarks for the broader sector.

articles.title: Apple Gets Approval for iPhone AI in China With Alibaba, Baidu
articles.summary: Apple has received Chinese government approval to roll out its Apple Intelligence AI features in China through partnerships with Alibaba and Baidu, a long-awaited regulatory clearance. This development is significant for both Apple's competitive position in China's smartphone market and as a case study in navigating AI regulation in a geopolitically sensitive environment.

articles.title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Vera Rubin on Track Despite Delay Talk
articles.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed that the company's next-generation Vera Rubin AI accelerator systems are in production and on schedule for customer delivery, pushing back on reports of manufacturing delays. Timely delivery of Vera Rubin is critical for maintaining Nvidia's dominance in the AI chip market amid growing competition.

articles.title: Microsoft Gives Sellers Tips to Knock Down Anthropic, OpenAI
articles.summary: Microsoft is internally coaching its sales team to compete aggressively against Anthropic and OpenAI by highlighting weaknesses in their AI products. This reveals intensifying commercial rivalry among leading AI companies as enterprise AI spending becomes a major battleground.

articles.title: CIA Says AI Drones Give Russian Troops Only 30 Minutes to Live
articles.summary: CIA Director John Ratcliffe stated that Ukrainian AI-guided attack drones are so effective that Russian soldiers survive an average of only 20–30 minutes on the battlefield. This highlights the rapidly transformative and lethal impact of AI-enabled autonomous weapons in modern warfare.

articles.title: OpenAI's first branded hardware is... a light-up keyboard?
articles.summary: OpenAI has released its first branded hardware product, the Codex Micro, a light-up keyboard designed to help users monitor multiple agentic AI threads simultaneously. The move signals OpenAI's ambition to expand beyond software into the hardware ecosystem surrounding agentic AI workflows.

articles.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
articles.summary: A survey of 101 enterprises found that AI agent orchestration is consolidating around major model-provider platforms, with Anthropic's Claude leading, but most deployed 'agents' are still little more than chatbot wrappers rather than true autonomous systems. This gap between enterprise ambition and actual capability highlights a deployment maturity problem that could slow real-world AI productivity gains.

articles.title: China Sends Robots Out Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
articles.summary: China is deploying humanoid robots in real-world industrial and domestic settings to collect behavioral training data, accelerating the development of robot AI 'brains' through large-scale human demonstration video capture. This effort underscores China's strategic push to lead in embodied AI and robotics, intensifying competition with US and other Western players.

articles.title: Palantir’s CTO Sees Chinese AI Models Posing Economic Risk to US
articles.summary: Palantir's CTO Shyam Sankar publicly stated that Chinese AI models have been developed using unauthorized use of Silicon Valley AI research outputs, posing an economic and competitive threat to the US AI industry. The claim adds to growing geopolitical tensions over AI intellectual property and the risk of technology transfer to strategic rivals.

articles.title: Nokia, Nvidia Unveil AI-Powered Network, Doubling Data Loads
articles.summary: Nokia and Nvidia have jointly developed AI-powered network technology that doubles telecommunications data throughput capacity, the first major product from their nine-month-old partnership. The collaboration demonstrates how AI is being embedded into core network infrastructure, with Nvidia extending its reach well beyond data centers.
